title: How to build proactive agents & self-improving company (Fully explained)
summary: The video explains how to build proactive AI agents using feedback loops to enable self-improvement and autonomous decision-making. It covers practical implementations like autonomous ads optimization and SEO, leveraging memory and tooling frameworks like Loopany to sustain continuous improvement cycles.
